features: HD AMOLED Display: JOAUTRIAL smartwatch with 1.43" AMOLED HD display, excellent image quality and colour reproduction capability, In addition, the smartwatch is piece stainless steel metal case material, with a soft and comfortable strap that fits snugly around the wrist, ensuring comfort for long periods of time

Built-in GPS & Compass: This smartwatch built-in GPS, compass as well as GLONASS, BeiDou, Galileo, NAVIC, QZSS and simultaneous co-location of multiple systems, And without needing to carry a mobile phone, you can record and view your running route on the smartwatch, After syncing with your phone, hiking maps can be created in the APP

Fast Charging & LED Flashlight: This smart watch equipped with a 530mAh high-capacity battery, Up to 20 days standby time after 2 hours of charging, The smartwatch also has a built-in LED flashlight, which can provide enough illumination for emergency situations, such as camping, hiking or night adventures, making your night outings safer

170 Sports Modes: This waterproof watch offers 170+ sport modes, including walking, running, cycling, swimming, yoga, basketball, etc, it also IP68 waterproof rating, Even when you are exercising, washing your hands and sweating, you can record the duration and calorie consumption of each exercise, and view exercise history and trends through the mobile app

Receive notification messages anytime: after connecting your phone via bluetooth, smartwatches can take calls, control music and sync contacts, as well as receive message notifications (Facebook, WhatsApp and Instagram, etc.) You won't miss any important calls or messages, even if you keep your mobile phone in your pocket

Wide Compatibility: This smartwatch is compatible with iPhone and Android phones, Adjuvant with Android 5.0, iOS 11.0 and Bluetooth 5.3 and above, If you encounter any problems when using this product, please contact us by email, our professional service team will reply you within 24 hours and provide you with the best solution
